meta.tagline: Precision labelling and packaging machines, engineered in Malaysia.

home.heroH1: Engineered in Malaysia. Built to outlast the line.
home.heroSub: Precision labelling and packaging machines for ASEAN manufacturers. Local support, OPEX financing from RM 1,800/month, custom automation engineered for your floor.

items.title: Built here.
items.body: Local manufacturing, local engineers, local support. 4-week delivery instead of 6 months from China.

items.title: OPEX, not CAPEX.
items.body: Financing from RM 1,800/month with MIDA-approved partners. ROI in 14 months.

items.title: Custom by default.
items.body: Every floor is different. We engineer to your container, your throughput, your existing line.

machineFinderCta.title: Not sure which machine?
machineFinderCta.body: Describe your product and your line. We'll recommend the right machine, financing tier, and timeline.

items.a: Standard machines ship in 4 weeks from order confirmation. Custom builds are typically 8–12 weeks.
Yes. Every machine includes on-site installation, line integration, and operator training across Peninsular Malaysia, Sabah, and Sarawak.
Two years parts and labour, with optional extended-coverage plans up to five years.
Yes — we partner with MIDA-approved financiers offering monthly payments from RM 1,800. Typical payback is 14 months.
Yes — we ship across ASEAN with full CE, SIRIM, and origin documentation.

items.q: What containers do your labellers support?
items.a: Round, oval, square, conical, and custom shapes from 30mm to 250mm diameter. Wrap-around, front-and-back, top, and bottom labelling supported.

financing.title: OPEX, not CAPEX.
financing.subtitle: Spread the cost. Bank the ROI.

forms.name: Name
forms.thanks: Thanks — we'll be in touch within one business day.
